title: OTP-2 Satellite Musical Beacon
short description: Musical transmission originating from the OTP-2 Cubesat
description:
Signal now identified as OTP-2/Barry-2. (2025-052AB; 63235) Satellite will broadcast this tune in-between telemetry bursts. Song is the [Kerbal Space Program theme](https://youtu.be/-idB7XK2xI8?si=d1uN16s6_gYFhjYL)

Thumbnail image was created by slowing down playback with high waterfall speed. 

 [I/Q on MEGA](https://mega.nz/file/0z1QCLpA#mtLZ6PL7HzepXB7na-os1f93jWVuoiqGf95uwLWpA4k)
